channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Yemen’s civilians fear fallout after Houthis enter Iran war
item.description: Fears of air strikes and rising prices dominate everyday life in Sanaa as Yemen becomes embroiled in regional conflict.

item.title: Trump says US armed Iranian dissidents via Kurds, Kurdish groups deny claim
item.description: Trump's admission gives credence to Iranian assertion that the January protests were backed by the West to create chaos.

item.title: Iran’s top university bombed as US, Israel intensify attacks; 34 killed
item.description: Tehran says it will respond 'in kind' to attacks on its infrastructure, accuses Trump of inciting 'war crimes'.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 38 of US-Israeli attacks?
item.description: Tensions continue after Trump's threat on Truth Social for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: A new regional order for the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The GCC and Iran can come up with a new security architecture for the Strait of Hormuz that can give Trump an off-ramp.

item.title: Vietnam’s gig workers slammed by rising fuel costs amid fallout of Iran war
item.description: Diesel prices have more than doubled in the Southeast Asian nation amid Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran says response to ceasefire proposals formulated
item.description: Iran says no direct talks during escalating US-Israeli attacks as Trump's Hormuz deadline nears.

item.title: Has the humanitarian crisis in Gaza been ignored?
item.description: Conditions in Gaza worsen amid the United States-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Israeli air strike hits crowd in Gaza City
item.description: Several Palestinians were rushed to hospital with severe injuries after an Israeli air strike hit a crowd in Gaza City.

item.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
item.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.
